name: ServiceMax Field Service API
what_it_does: ServiceMax REST API for enterprise field service management platform (built on Salesforce). Enables AI agents to manage work orders, dispatch technicians, track assets and equipment maintenance, handle parts and inventory, schedule preventive maintenance, and integrate IoT data into service workflows. ServiceMax serves industrial, manufacturing, medical device, and technology verticals.
use_cases: Creating and dispatching work orders from service operations agents
Tracking equipment assets and maintenance history from asset management agents
Optimizing technician scheduling and routing from field service dispatch agents
Integrating IoT sensor data with preventive maintenance workflows from IoT agents
not_for: Simple help desk without field technician dispatch
Consumer appliance service without enterprise asset tracking
Non-Salesforce environments without willingness to integrate with Force.com
best_when: An industrial, manufacturing, or medical device company using ServiceMax wants AI agents to automate work order creation, optimize technician dispatch, and integrate asset maintenance data with service operations.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Field service errors on critical industrial or medical equipment can have safety consequences. ServiceMax is Salesforce-native — requires Salesforce infrastructure and licensing.

auth.notes: ServiceMax uses Salesforce OAuth 2.0 (platform auth). Standard Salesforce Connected App OAuth flow. Inherits Salesforce's auth model including named credentials and permission sets.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise licensing; built on Salesforce
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise per-user licensing; requires Salesforce platform license
pricing.notes: PTC-owned (acquired 2023). Requires Salesforce platform. Enterprise pricing negotiated. Developer sandbox available for customers.

performance.rate_limits: Salesforce API limits apply (per-org daily limits); ServiceMax-specific limits on top

known_agent_gotchas: Salesforce-native: all API calls go through Salesforce APIs — Salesforce daily API limits apply
No public MCP server — enterprise REST API via Salesforce platform
Requires Salesforce Connected App configuration for OAuth
ServiceMax data model extends Salesforce objects — learn SF object model first
PTC acquired ServiceMax in 2023 — product roadmap and pricing in transition
Industrial and medical device field service — safety-critical operations require validation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Salesforce-native auth (OAuth2, permission sets). SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. Field service data on industrial/medical equipment. Safety-critical use cases require validation.

security_score_components.security_notes: Salesforce OAuth. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. Safety-critical field service data. Industrial and medical equipment maintenance.
